summary: Document Template Generation feature testing completed successfully. All 4 backend endpoints pass (14/14 tests) and the frontend UI is fully functional with all 10 legal document templates displayed, form filling, QR/signature toggles, preview, and PDF generation working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/templates/list - Returns all 10 document templates with correct structure
✅ GET /api/templates/{template_id} - Returns specific template details with placeholders
✅ POST /api/templates/preview - Generates HTML preview with filled placeholders
✅ POST /api/templates/generate - Creates valid PDF document with QR stamp option
✅ GET /api/templates/history - Returns list of generated documents (requires auth)

✅ Template list returns: Power of Attorney, Affidavit, Legal Notice, Legal Service Agreement, Court Filing Cover Sheet, Demand Letter, Witness Statement, Sale Agreement, Lease Agreement, Last Will and Testament
✅ Each template has: id, name, name_sw, category, description, placeholders array
✅ Categories include: authorization, sworn_statement, notice, contract, court, estate
✅ Preview fills placeholders and uses blanks for unfilled fields
✅ Generate returns application/pdf content with correct content-disposition header
✅ PDF generation works for all 10 template types
✅ History endpoint stores generated documents with advocate_id, template info, data, timestamps
✅ Frontend: Doc Generator tab visible in Practice Management page
✅ Frontend: All 10 template cards displayed with names, descriptions, categories, and field counts
✅ Frontend: Clicking template opens form with all placeholder fields
✅ Frontend: QR Verification Stamp toggle present with description
✅ Frontend: Digital Signature toggle present with description
✅ Frontend: Live Document Preview panel shows filled content in real-time
✅ Frontend: Preview Document button generates HTML preview
✅ Frontend: Generate PDF button initiates PDF download
✅ Frontend: History button shows count of generated documents (15)
✅ Frontend: Back button returns to template selection
seed_data_creation: Test documents generated with TEST_ prefix for testing PDF generation and history tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Template Generation feature fully implemented and tested. Backend uses reportlab library for PDF generation and qrcode library for QR stamps. Templates are defined in /app/backend/document_templates.py with 10 pre-defined legal document templates. Frontend DocumentGeneratorTab component is in /app/frontend/src/pages/PracticeManagementPage.jsx (lines 1312-1770). The feature integrates with the existing Practice Management page as a new tab. History is stored in MongoDB 'generated_documents' collection.

feature_verification_summary.template_list_endpoint: PASS - Returns all 10 templates with correct structure
feature_verification_summary.template_preview_endpoint: PASS - Fills placeholders and returns HTML content
feature_verification_summary.template_generate_endpoint: PASS - Creates valid PDF with QR stamp and signature options
feature_verification_summary.template_history_endpoint: PASS - Returns generated document history for authenticated user
feature_verification_summary.frontend_tab_navigation: PASS - Doc Generator tab visible and clickable
feature_verification_summary.frontend_template_cards: PASS - All 10 templates displayed with metadata
feature_verification_summary.frontend_form_fields: PASS - All placeholder fields rendered as inputs
feature_verification_summary.frontend_qr_toggle: PASS - QR Verification Stamp toggle present
feature_verification_summary.frontend_live_preview: PASS - Document Preview panel shows filled content
feature_verification_summary.frontend_buttons: PASS - Preview Document and Generate PDF buttons functional
feature_verification_summary.frontend_history: PASS - History button shows count and access to generated docs
